name: Koramangala
label: Positive
summary: My office is in Richmond Town and some relatives have advised to me rent a room in Koramangala saying that it is a better place.
quotes: My office is in Richmond Town and some relatives have advised to me rent a room in Koramangala saying that it is a better place.

name: Indiranagar
label: Positive
summary: I recently went on a stroll through Defence Colony in Indiranagar and couldn't help but imagine how nice it would be to have a home there.
quotes: I recently went on a stroll through Defence Colony in Indiranagar and couldn't help but imagine how nice it would be to have a home there.

name: Bellandur
label: Negative
summary: Once, Bellandur Lake teemed with life, supporting a bustling fish market that echoed the richness of its waters. On the other hand, just endured 2 FULL HOURS in this kia bus jam from Hebbal to Bellandur.
quotes: Thankfully I dont travel via this route but I travel to bellandur from Banashankari on 500 series bus and after Silk board its a hellish traffic, I usually i just sleep in the bus…
Once, Bellandur Lake teemed with life, supporting a bustling fish market that echoed the richness of its waters.
Some times I feel I live in a under developed village named bellandur in bangalore, high rents, worst infrastructure and now the electricity is gone from last 20 hours.

name: Sarjapur
label: Negative
summary: I have observed that the junctions (big ones, for example, Sarjapur) which have the red light timer refresh after 30-60 seconds have way better… On the other hand, after facing the traffic woes, I decided to walk everyday to office situated in Sarjapur road 3 kms from home, and that was even worse.
quotes: After facing the traffic woes, I decided to walk everyday to office situated in Sarjapur road 3 kms from home, and that was even worse.
I know that Sarjapur Road-Bellandur have crazy high rents even though public infrastructure is not good.
Godrej Park Retreat: Hadosaddipura, near sarjapur road, G+27 x 4 towers Each flat is a car on road Each office seat is a car on road Will add at least 5000+ cars on a daily basis…

name: Whitefield
label: Negative
summary: Even though I'm traveling on a BMTC public bus, the Silkboard to Whitefield route at this time is a clear sign that everyone is heading for their 9-5… On the other hand, but this is the third day in a row I’ve been stuck in hopeless traffic because of garba or Durga Pooja around whitefield.
quotes: But this is the third day in a row I’ve been stuck in hopeless traffic because of garba or Durga Pooja around whitefield.
Hey everyone, The main road connecting Mahadevpura and Whitefield near my area is in a terrible state — full of potholes and broken patches.
Even though I'm traveling on a BMTC public bus, the Silkboard to Whitefield route at this time is a clear sign that everyone is heading for their 9-5 jobs.

name: Malleshwaram
label: Positive
summary: Even super crowded areas like Lalbagh, Gandhi Bazaar, Malleshwaram back markets are quiet as far as vehicle noise is concerned. On the other hand, had not been to Malleshwaram since I stopped living there sometime in 1994 -- Until today morning.
quotes: Even super crowded areas like Lalbagh, Gandhi Bazaar, Malleshwaram back markets are quiet as far as vehicle noise is concerned.
This is a really good juice shop that i found in Malleshwaram its walking distance from the metro station and the famous CTR cafe, the lady is just the sweetest doing a great job…
Much of Mysuru still retains that old Kannada charm found in neighborhoods like Jayanagar and Malleshwaram.
